name: powerglitch
when_to_use: 需要把某个已有元素(标题/logo/图片/div)做成可配置的赛博朋克 glitch(切片错位 + RGB 通道偏移 + 随机抖动)时用它,可选 always/hover/click/manual 触发。用来给现成内容加 glitch 装饰,而非一个通用 keyframe 抖动;它 augment 你的元素、不产出数据也不做布局。widget 内必须把 shadow 里的真实 HTMLElement 传给 glitch(),不能传 selector 字符串(字符串按 document 解析、看不到 shadow)。
why_valuable: 多层切片遮罩 + 通道分离 + 可信的随机时序是很繁琐的手工活,AI 徒手只能做出一眼假的弱抖动;PowerGlitch 用 WAAPI 生成分层 keyframe,原位包两层容器叠加克隆体,glitch 观感真实且零 CSS 注入。

en.when_to_use: Use it to apply a configurable cyberpunk glitch (slice displacement, RGB channel offsets, and random jitter) to an existing element such as a title, logo, image, or div, with optional always/hover/click/manual triggering. It decorates existing content rather than providing generic keyframe jitter; it augments your element and produces neither data nor layout. Inside a widget, pass the real HTMLElement from the shadow root to glitch(), not a selector string (strings resolve against document and cannot see shadow DOM).
en.why_valuable: Multi-layer slice masks, channel separation, and convincing randomized timing are tedious to build by hand, and AI-written versions produce obviously fake weak jitter; PowerGlitch uses WAAPI to generate layered keyframes, wraps the element in place with two containers, and overlays clones for a convincing glitch with no CSS injection.

data_in.note: powerglitch consumes a target element plus glitch options, not data. In a widget/shadow root, target must be a real HTMLElement (selector strings resolve against document); createContainers defaults to true and wraps the element in place with two containers.

schema.target: string | HTMLElement | NodeListOf<HTMLElement> | HTMLElement[] -- glitch target; inside a widget, pass the real element from shadow DOM, not a selector string

timing?.duration?: number -- animation-loop duration in ms, default 1000

options?.glitchTimeSpan?: false | { start: number, end: number } -- interval within 0..1 where glitching is concentrated, peaking at the midpoint
options?.shake?: false | { velocity: number, amplitudeX: number, amplitudeY: number } -- base-layer shake
options?.createContainers?: boolean -- default true; when false, the first glitch() argument must be a layer container whose first child is the element to glitch

spec.note: There is no canvas; glitch() wraps the target in place with two containers, and target content determines the size. Do not use vh or percentage heights. For SEO-sensitive scenarios, set optimizeSeo.

data_in.note: powerglitch 不吃数据、吃一个目标元素 + glitch options。widget/shadow 内 target 必须是真实 HTMLElement(selector 字符串按 document 解析);createContainers 默认 true 会在原位把元素包进两层容器。

schema.target: string | HTMLElement | NodeListOf<HTMLElement> | HTMLElement[] —— glitch 目标;widget 内传 shadow 里的真实元素,不要传 selector 字符串

timing?.duration?: number —— 动画循环时长 ms,默认 1000
timing?.iterations?: number —— 重复次数,默认 Infinity(永久)

options?.glitchTimeSpan?: false | { start: number, end: number } —— glitch 集中在 0..1 区间的一段,峰值在中点
options?.shake?: false | { velocity: number, amplitudeX: number, amplitudeY: number } —— 基层抖动

slice?.cssFilters?: string —— 自定义 filter(会禁用 hueRotate)

options?.pulse?: false | { scale: number } —— 脉冲缩放
options?.createContainers?: boolean —— 默认 true;false 时 glitch() 第一参数须是 layer 容器且其首子为被 glitch 元素

spec.note: 无 canvas;glitch() 在原位把目标包进两层容器,尺寸由目标内容撑开,禁 vh/百分比高。SEO 敏感场景可设 optimizeSeo。

example._why: 钉死 target 是元素 + options 分组,且 playMode/slice 是真实字段名。

uplink: display/decoration 默认不上行;glitch() 返回的 startGlitch/stopGlitch(manual 模式手动控制)由消费 AI 直接接。

carriers.widget: supported:WAAPI 无 CSS 注入,作用于 shadow 内的真实元素;务必传 element 而非 selector

isolation.evidence: +esm 导出 named {PowerGlitch, mergeOptions},无 default(误用 default import 会拿到 undefined)。build/src/index.d.ts:PowerGlitch.glitch(elOrSelector?, options?) => {containers, startGlitch, stopGlitch},另有 generateLayers/getDefaultOptions。+esm 隔离扫描:document.head=0、createElement('style')=0、insertRule=0、adoptedStyleSheets=0、document.body=0、window/DOMContentLoaded 监听=0 —— 动画走 WAAPI(d.ts 里 timing 为 EffectTiming/KeyframeEffect)。唯一 DOM 副作用是局部:glitch() 在原位把目标包进两层容器并叠加克隆体(index.d.ts createContainers 文档)。注意:字符串首参经 document.querySelectorAll 解析(+esm:`typeof e=="string"?...document.queryS...`),故 shadow 内必须传真实 HTMLElement。license:manifest 省略了 license 字段,但仓库 LICENSE 文件为 MIT(Copyright 2022 Benjamin Raymond)。
